Notice Of Motion And Motion To Consolidate Cases (Cgc-12-519021)
Off Calendar May-25-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jon Michaelson, Esq., from K&L Gates, 650-798-6704, for plaintiff and moving party

No other Appearance. The Tentative Ruling is adopted.
PLAINTIFFS WILLIAM KING AND ZEPHYR HEALTH, INC.'S Motion To Consolidate Cases (with CGC-12-519021).
Granted. The cases involve common questions of fact and law and consolidation is in the interest of judicial economy. The cases are consolidated for all purposes. Case number 518213 is the lead case and all further filings shall be only in that case. Order signed in open Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer And Consolidate Cases
Off Calendar May-25-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jon Michaelson, Esq., from K&L Gates, 650-798-6704, for plaintiff and moving party

No other Appearance. The Tentative Ruling is adopted.
PLAINTIFF WILLIAM KING, ZEPHYR HEALTH, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION Motion To Transfer And Consolidate Cases is Granted. Plaintiffs have met the requirements of CCP sections 403 and 404.1 and transfer and consolidation is appropriate. The Order of Judge Pierce of the Santa Clara County Superior Court shall stand. The laptop shall be turned over to Judge Ronald Sabraw (Ret.) of JAMS who will serve as special master and report to and make recommendations to this Court. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077
